svg.text: Stock-part stack · NASA reference-sheet format · see Sheet 2 for stage separation sequence
NOZZLE EXIT PLANE — ALIGN HAMMER & SWIVEL
MOUNT HAMMERS WITH NOZZLES AT OR ABOVE THE SWIVEL BELL;
KEEP TOPS HIGH ON CORE TANK TO CLEAR EXHAUST PLUME
PARTS LIST — REFERENCE DATA, STOCK COMPONENTS
• Drawing is schematic (NTS) — dimensions and masses are stock-part reference values, not drawn to scale.
• Both FL-T800 tanks share item no. 9; both TR-18A decouplers share item no. 5 (see parts list).
• Items 7-8 (antenna, fuel cells) are stowed inside the service bay (item 6) on the centerline.
• Dashed red lines mark pyrotechnic stack-separation planes; see Sheet 2 for full staging sequence.
• Fin radial clocking (4X on core tank, 45° off boosters): see VIEW A-A.
Kerbal Space Program — mission documentation appendix
